text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(Okay, it's all about positioning from here... I'll
hold this position for a bit, and...)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's made a move from the inside! She's coming
up from the rear!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (Not yet. Be patient and go at your own pace...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: NOW!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: YAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here comes Satono Diamond! What an incredible
burst of acceleration in the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond finishes in first place! This
unbreakable diamond has shattered the barrier
that stood in her way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Awww yeah! Yesss! YAHOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: You did it, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... That gave me goosebumps! Satono
Diamond's so good!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Hah! So that's her true strength! Now I get why
she was so upset about her performances at the
Satsuki Sho and Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I knew you'd do awesome out there!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (My legs feel so... light...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (I did it!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Trainer!
choice_data_list: Congrats on first place! That was a great run!
Congrats on first place! That was a great run!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
My legs were so light today! Even now that I'm
done running, I'm not tired at all!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I finally ran a race I can be satisfied with!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It feels like shackles have been removed from my
legs!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I feel so light.
Not just my body... my mind as well!
choice_data_list: It would appear you've overcome your jinx.
It would appear you've overcome your jinx.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Heh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tears begin to trickle from Satono Diamond's
eyes. And then...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A hoarse, tearful cry echoes through the runners'
tunnel.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whispers of a jinx on the Satono family date back
before Satono Diamond was ever born. I can only
imagine the weight of growing up under such
circumstances.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps her declaration not to let the jinx get the
best of her gave her the push she needed to
overcome it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's finally free of its shackles.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Sob... Sorry...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
McQueen was right... I was focusing so much on
the jinx that it was holding me back.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But I'm okay now. I won't be led astray again!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to keep running like I did today and
prove that I can win more G1 races!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: That's easier said than done!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kita!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Congrats on winning the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! I won the same race you did last year! So
now I can hold my head high and say this...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Face me in the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: With pleasure!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That's okay with you, right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But you'd better prepare yourself! I'm going to be
on a completely different level in the Arima
Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But before we race, I'm going to show the whole
world the spirit of Japan and what I can do at the
Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm looking forward to seeing that!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And then let's make the Arima Kinen the best
race we can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the way back from Kyoto Racecourse...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. My heart hasn't stopped pounding all
day. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes. Even now.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Just thinking about running against Kita in the
Arima Kinen gets my blood pumping. Is this
anticipation, or is it excitement?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I never thought my silly childhood dream would
actually come true...
choice_data_list: Your dream of racing against Kitasan?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I used to imagine us running a G1 race
together. But it turns out reality is even more
dramatic.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Now Kita is the rival standing between me and my
dream of becoming an illustrious runner.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This is the most dramatic and exciting destiny I
could ask for!
choice_data_list: It sounds like the perfect race.
It sounds like the perfect race.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It is. Kita has always been ahead of me, but I'll
surpass her and make my dream—the Satono
family's dream—come true.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond shows no signs of hesitation.
The vermilion fire in her eyes is burning as fiercely
as the time we first met.
choice_data_list: First, we have to win the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Right! I have no intention of merely gawking like
a starstruck child.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've overcome the jinx, I intend to go
out there and pummel Kita and every other
senior!
